职位描述:

岗位职责

3.分析市场需求和竞争对手情况，不断优化产品功能和性能。

3.具有较强的沟通能力、团队合作能力和项目管理能力。

2、主导服务器操作系统架构设计，适配 x86_64、ARM64 等架构的数据中心硬件平台；完成内核裁剪与定制化配置（启动参数、NUMA 拓扑优化、CPU 调度策略、内核特性开关），满足云平台镜像构建与部署需求。

二、CMC战略洞察
1、行业情报收集与分析：带领团队，跟踪监管机构（如FDA、EMA、NMPA）新发布的CMC相关指南、法规变化，并提供解读建议；主导全球CMC竞争格局分析，识别行业颠覆性技术（如mRNA平台、连续生产、AI驱动的工艺优化、新型递送系统等），并评估其应用潜力；
2、战略制定支持：带领团队，定期向高管团队提供CMC战略简报，包括产能规划（如自建vs.外包生产、技术平台投资）、外部合作建议等；定期生成行业趋势报告（如竞争对手分析、技术差距评估），供管理层决策参考。
3、行业对标及信息拉通：带领团队，与研发、商务拓展（BD）、法规事务团队共享关键情报，推动数据驱动的决策流程；支持CMC团队在技术转移、工艺开发中的外部对标；
4、CDMO业务市场情报：带领团队，系统研究市场动态，定期向管理层提供市场格局、竞争情报及战略洞察报告；协助管理层及业务拓展团队发掘新兴业务机会，推动CDMO业务增长并确保战略合理性；深度协同各职能部门（重点支持BD团队），推进市场影响力提升。

三、CMC申报资料整合及管理
1、带领团队，主导项目国内外CMC CTD格式申报资料整合 (M2&M3) 及修订等工作，包括但不局限于：NMPA IND/INDs/NDA/PAS CTD dossier, FDA IND/INDa/NDA/PAS CTD dossier，EMA IMPD/MAA/PAS dossiers etc；
2、带领团队，主导国内外项目与监管沟通交流资料中CMC部分整合及修订等工作；
3、带领团队，支持RA，主导国内外项目监管问询回复中CMC部分整合及修订等工作。

四、团队建设
1、培养带教团队成员，成为软硬实力兼备、具有全生命周期开发及申报策略思维的技术专家。

2）具有5年以上的技术团队管理经验；
3）具有CMC行业分析、竞争情报或战略咨询相关经验；
5、技能要求：
1）具有良好的沟通协调能力，团队影响力；
2）具有外部数据调研能力；

6、其他要求：如具有基于AI LLM模型进行数据分析、信息挖掘经验，为加分项。

主导安全事件应急响应，分析攻击路径并输出改进建议。定期组织安全培训，提升团队安全意识与技能。

精通Web安全技术（如OWASP Top 10、Burp Suite、Metasploit）。熟悉至少一种编程语言（Python/Go/Java），能开发自动化安全工具。

MPS is a leader in developing cutting-edge power solutions for the most demanding applications in telecommunications, robotics, artificial intelligence (AI), industrial and intelligent manufacturing, medical systems, and automated test equipment (ATE). We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Power Electronics Engineer with emphasis in PSU design and verification to join our team and drive the development of next-generation, high-density, and highly reliable DC-DC power converters.

Position Summary:
The Senior Power Electronics Engineer will be responsible for the end-to-end design, development, and validation of isolated power conversion products. The ideal candidate will possess deep theoretical knowledge and hands-on experience in power supply design, from initial concept and magnetics design to prototyping, testing, and high-volume manufacturing transfer. A strong focus on safety, reliability, and electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) is paramount.

Key Responsibilities:
· Architect, design, and develop high-performance, isolated DC-DC power converters (200V-10kV working voltage) and power systems within a power range of 100W to 10kW.
· Design and specify custom transformers and inductors, optimizing for performance, cost, and manufacturability, with a focus on both galvanic and capacitive isolation techniques to meet safety and noise requirements.
· Ensure all designs comply with stringent international safety requirements for telecom, AI, ATE, and satellite applications (e.g., UL/IEC/EN 60950-1, 62368-1, and specific space-level standards).
· Interface with and program onboard microprocessors and system managers for power supply control, monitoring, fault logging, and system communication (e.g., PMBus, I2C).
· Design for Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC), developing strategies to mitigate EMI and conducted noise to meet CISPR/FCC Class A and B standards.
· Develop and implement current sharing techniques for multi-phase and parallelable power modules to achieve scalable power solutions.
· Lead the technical execution of projects, including schematic capture, PCB layout supervision, prototyping, and validation testing. Hands-on experience with module and PCB assembly, rework, and debugging is essential.
· Perform detailed failure analysis, identify common failure modes (e.g., transformer saturation, FET avalanche, gate drive issues, thermal runaway), and implement robust design prevention strategies.
· Design and execute validation test plans, including the use of Automated Test Equipment (ATE) for production testing and characterization.
· Collaborate cross-functionally with mechanical engineering, firmware, manufacturing and the business management teams to ensure a successful product launch.

Required Qualifications & Experience:
· B.S. (M.S. preferred) in Electrical Engineering or a related field.
· 7+ years of direct experience in the design and development of isolated switch-mode power supplies (SMPS).
· Must-Have Technical Skills:
· Proven expertise in transformer design for high-frequency power conversion, including core selection, winding techniques, and isolation barrier design.
· In-depth understanding of galvanic and capacitive isolation standards, design practices, and validation methods.
· Strong knowledge of microprocessor/microcontroller integration for power control, including programming and debugging skills (C/C++ or similar).
· Demonstrable experience designing to meet safety and EMC requirements for Telecom, AI, ATE, and/or Satellite applications.
· Proficiency in simulating, modeling, and mitigating EMI and conducted noise.
· Hands-on experience with power supply prototyping, module and PCB assembly, soldering, and debugging.
· Understand all DC/DC architectures and topologies: ex. Buck-boost, flyback, current mode, COT, etc.
· Familiarity with current sharing techniques and N+1 redundant power architectures.
· Experience with power levels ranging from 100W to 10kW.
· Proficiency with schematic capture and PCB layout tools (e.g., Altium Designer, Cadence).
· Experience with power electronics simulation tools (e.g., PSIM, Simplis).

Desired Qualifications:
· Experience with wide-bandgap semiconductors (GaN, SiC).
· Knowledge of thermal management and mechanical packaging for high-density power supplies.
· Experience with high-voltage design (>1kV).
· Familiarity with reliability prediction models (e.g., MIL-HDBK-217, Telcordia).
职能类别：
